page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool for decompressing an archive file (zip, gz, tar.gz, fastq.gz, fastq.bz2 or tar.bz2) and merging all files into only one.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool for decompressing an archive file (zip, gz, tar.gz, fastq.gz, fastq.bz2 or tar.bz2) and merging all files into only one.
